zh.lifeSummary: 當Robert Wylie於1453年出生在英國英格蘭賀特福爾利時，他的父親John Wyllie30歲，母親Sara Samuelsdotter13歲。他於1463年之前與Agnes Scott在英國英格蘭賀特福爾利結婚。他們至少是4個兒子的父母。他去世於1503年12月12日在他的家鄉享年50歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭賀特福爾利。

nameMeanings.name: Wylie
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish: from a Scots pet form of the personal name   William  .

variants.name: William
meanings: English (of Norman origin): from the Middle English personal name William, Willam, Willem, an Old Picard and Norman French form of ancient Germanic Willihelm, composed of the elements wil- ‘will, desire’ + helm- ‘helmet, protection’. This Norman personal name became widely used in England, Scotland and Wales after the Conquest, mainly no doubt in honor of the Conqueror himself. By the 13th century it had already become the most popular personal name in England. A Parisian form of the name Guillaume was also sometimes used (see Gillam ), which in medieval Wales was adopted as Gwilym (see Gwilliam ).
Americanized form (translation into English) of French   Guillaume  .

variants.name: Wyllie
meanings: Scottish (Ayrshire and Lanarkshire): variant of   Wylie  .

nameMeanings.name: Robert
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the many French names of Germanic origin that were introduced into Britain by the Normans; it has since remained in continuous use. It is derived from the nearly synonymous elements hrōd ‘fame’ + berht ‘bright, famous’, and had a native Old English predecessor of similar form (Hreodbeorht), which was supplanted by the Norman name. Two dukes of Normandy in the 11th century bore the name: the father of William the Conqueror (sometimes identified with the legendary Robert the Devil), and his eldest son. It was borne also by three kings of Scotland, notably Robert the Bruce ( 1274–1329 ), who freed Scotland from English domination. The altered short form Bob is very common, but Hob and Dob, which were common in the Middle Ages and gave rise to surnames, are extinct. See also Rupert .

en.lifeSummary: When Robert Wylie was born in 1453, in Thorley, Hertfordshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, John Wyllie, was 30 and his mother, Sara Samuelsdotter, was 13. He married Agnes Scott before 1463, in Thorley, Hertfordshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 4 sons. He died on 12 December 1503, in his hometown, at the age of 50, and was buried in Thorley, Hertfordshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Robert Wylie est né en 1453, à Thorley, Hertfordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, John Wyllie, avait 30 ans et sa mère, Sara Samuelsdotter, avait 13 ans. Il a épousé Agnes Scott avant 1463, à Thorley, Hertfordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils. Il est décédé le 12 décembre 1503, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 50 ans, et a été enterré à Thorley, Hertfordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

ja.lifeSummary: Robert Wylieが1453年にイギリスイギリスハートフォードシュアイアソルリーで生まれた時，父John Wyllieは30歳，母Sara Samuelsdotterは13歳であった。1463年以前にイギリスイギリスハートフォードシュアイアソルリーでAgnes Scottと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子の親であった。彼は1503年12月12日に故郷で50歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスハートフォードシュアイアソルリーにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Robert Wylie(이)가 1453년 영국 잉글랜드 허트퍼드실르 토를리에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John Wyllie(은)는 30세였고, 그의 어머니 Sara Samuelsdotter(은)는 13세였다. 그는 1463년 이전 영국 잉글랜드 허트퍼드실르 토를리에서 Agnes Scott(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1503년 12월 12일 그의 고향에서 50세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 허트퍼드실르 토를리에 묻혔다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Robert Wylie родился в 1453 г. в местности таурли, хиртфордшир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени John Wyllie было 30 лет, а матери, которую звали Sara Samuelsdotter, 13. Он женился на женщине по имени Agnes Scott перед 1463 г. в местности таурли, хиртфордшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына. Он умер 12 декабря 1503 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 50 лет и был похоронен в местности таурли, хиртфордшир, Англия, Великобритания.
